01 About the Studio

Design with purpose, built for growth.

Shelby Designs is a modern graphic design brand focused on creating clean, high-quality visuals that help businesses and content creators stand out. We don't just create visuals — we create designs that represent your brand, attract attention, and deliver real impact.

"Our goal is simple: to turn ideas into powerful visuals that attract attention and build strong brand presence."

Clean & Modern

Simplicity and quality — visuals that look professional and stand out instantly.

Fast & Reliable

Every project delivered on schedule without compromising quality.

Client-Focused

Your vision comes first — we bring your ideas to life together.

Strategic

Designed with purpose, not just to look good, but to connect.

02 What We Do

Services

01

Logo Design & Brand Identity

Unique, memorable logos plus complete identity systems — colors, typography, and style guides.

Social Media Design

Eye-catching posts, ads, and banners for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube.

03 Selected Work

Portfolio

Full-Service Capability

Wordmark

Negative-space lettering concept — built entirely from letterform gaps.

Brand Mark

Bold geometric wordmark for a forward-facing tech brand.

Wordmark

Sharp, dynamic lettering with a bold serif energy for the Luna brand.

Website UI

Restaurant landing page with warm, appetite-driven hierarchy.

Social Templates

Instagram post system for consistent, on-brand feed presentation.

Cover Art

Channel banner built for instant brand recognition.

Social Preview

In-feed mockup showing how designs look in a real Instagram post.

Shopify Store

Custom Shopify storefront design built for smooth product discovery.

Brand Systems

Logo, social, flyer, web, and Shopify design — one cohesive identity.

Event Flyer

Bold poster design for a live event — clear hierarchy, high-impact type.

04 Investment

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Starter
$50
Perfect for a single, focused design need.
  • 1 logo or single graphic design
  • 2 initial concepts
  • 1 revision round
  • Source files (PNG, JPG, PDF)
  • 3-day delivery
Get Started
Most Popular
Growth
$150
A complete starter identity for a growing brand.
  • Full logo & brand identity (colors, type, style guide)
  • 5 social media graphic templates
  • 3 initial concepts
  • 2 revision rounds
  • All source files
  • 5-day delivery
Get Started
Brand Pro
$400
Full brand system across every touchpoint.
  • Everything in Growth
  • Website UI design (up to 5 pages)
  • Flyer / poster design
  • Shopify store styling
  • 3 revision rounds
  • 10-day delivery + priority support
Get Started

Need something bigger or more custom — full Shopify build, multi-page site, or ongoing content? Message for a custom quote →
